entries.caption: World Soul Spells
intro: The World Soul flows through you, you always have these spells prepared, and they don't count against your spells known.
rows: {@spell Cure Wounds}, {@spell Wound Transference|Ryian} *, {@spell Inflict Wounds}
{@spell Mass Healing Word}, {@spell Life Siphon|Ryian} *, {@spell Fireball|PHB}
{@spell Aura of Purity}, {@spell Aura of Balance|Ryian} *, {@spell Sickening Radiance|XGE}
{@spell Mass Cure Wounds}, {@spell Circle of Life|Ryian} *, {@spell Destructive Wave}
footnotes: *only when the world is in balance

subclassFeature.name: Wings of Balance
entries: At first level, you gain the ability to check the balance of the world. In order to do so, you can sprout spectral wings, which colour would change based on the depending on the world's balance. Radiant while for good, midnight black for evil, and as close to what it'd look like if your race had wings for neutral.
At 6th level, you gain flying speed equal to your speed for 1 minute when activating your wings.

subclassFeature.name: Scales of Power
entries: You gain benefits in accordance with where the scales land.

entries.caption: Morality Powers
rows: Any healing for any additional {@dice 1d4} + your warlock level.
Any damaging spells deal an additional {@damage 1d6} + your warlock level. One instance of damage per spell
You gain both benefits and you choose to empower one, gaining double benefits until the start of your next turn. This feature can be used once per short or long rest.

subclassFeature.name: Conduit of Balance
entries: As you become a conduit for balance, you gain resistances based on the world scales.Additionally, when dealing damage of that type, you can add your Charisma modifier to the damage dealt.

subclassFeature.name: Improved Scales of Power
entries: As your power and proficiency increases, so does the attunement to the scales of power. The damage and healing die of Scales of Powers

entries.caption: Scales of Power Improvements
intro: In addition, you gain the following benefits.
rows: During a short rest, you can bestow temporary hit points equal to your charisma modifier to creatures up to your PB
When a creature benefits from temporary hit points granted by you, they also receive the effects of {@spell death ward}

You gain a pool of d6 dice that you can use to hinder enemy attacks and saving throws. When a creature you can see within 60 feet of you makes an attack roll or saving throw, you may use your reaction to substract {@dice 1d6} from the result. You may use this feature equal times to your Proficiency Modifier.

subclassFeature.name: Surprise
entries: Nyah and Neon will come up with something fun.

spell.name: Wound Transference
entries: You touch a creature, inflicting {@damage 4d6} points of necrotic damage. Half of the damage you deal, you absorb and are able to heal yourself or another creature within 30 feet for such an amount.

components.m: a balanced material plane, which the spell consumes

entriesHigherLevel.name: At Higher Levels
entries: The damage increases by {@damage 2d6} for each spell slot level above 1

spell.name: Conditional Strike
entries: You target an enemy and an ally. Every condition on said ally is transferred onto the enemy, unless it succeeds on a COnstitution saving throw. For every condition, apart from unconscious, the enemy takes {@damage 2d8} force damage from the violent transfer and the ally heals for the same amount.

components.m: a balanced material plane, which the spell consumes

spell.name: Life Siphon
entries: You form a 20ft sphere within a space you can see which proceeds to suck the life out of anyone caught within it. Any creature that starts or ends it's turn within the sphere, must make a CON save or suffer {@damage 4d10} necrotic damage.Creatures hit by this ability can not heal or be healed until the start of their next turn.
Half of this damage can then be distributed as you see fit to allies within 60 feet of you.

components.m: a balanced material plane, which the spell consumes

entriesHigherLevel.name: At Higher Levels
entries: The damage increases by {@damage 1d6} for each spell slot level above 3

spell.name: Aura of Balance
entries: You create an aura that extends 10 feet for the duration around yourself or an ally that hurts the wicked and protects those who fight against such things. When an enemy starts or ends its turn there, it must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the creature takes {@damage 3d8} necrotic or radiant damage (your choice), or half as much on a successful one. Half the damage dealt will then be used as a shield for the righteous as temporary hit points that last for one round. A creature can willing fail this saving throw.

components.m: a balanced material plane, which the spell consumes

entriesHigherLevel.name: At Higher Levels
entries: The damage increases by {@damage 1d8} for each spell slot level above 4

spell.name: Circle of Life
entries: Each enemy creature within 40 feet cone suffers {@damage 8d8} radiant, fire, necrotic or cold damage or half damage upon a successful dexterity save. The total damage dealt is the healing that you are able to give out to allies within the cone.

components.m: a balanced material plane, which the spell consumes

spell.name: Keeli's Prismatic Barrage
entries: Six multicolored rays of light flash from your hand. Each ray is a different color and has a different power and purpose. Each creature in a 30-foot cone must make a Dexterity saving throw. For each target, roll a {@dice 1d6} to determine which color ray affects it.

rows: The target takes {@dice 4d6} fire damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.
The target takes {@dice 4d6} lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.
The target takes {@dice 4d6} poison damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.

On a failed save, the target is {@condition restrained}. It must then make a Constitution saving throw at the end of each of its turns. If it successfully saves three times, the spell ends. If it fails its save three times, it permanently turns to stone and is subjected to the petrified condition. The successes and failures don't need to be consecutive; keep track of both until the target collects three of a kind.

On a failed save, the target is {@condition blinded}. It must then make a Wisdom saving throw at the start of your next turn. A successful save ends the blindness. If it fails that save, the creature is transported to another plane of existence of the DM's choosing and is no longer blinded. They reappear after 1d4 turns to the spot closest to their original position.
The target is struck by two rays. Roll twice more, rerolling any 6.

item.name: Rimeskin Potion
entries: When you drink this potion, you gain the effect of {@spell Armor of Agathys} as if it was cast at 2nd level.
This potions container seems to hold a tiny cloud inside
We got these off the cult leader dude in session 4.

item.name: Elemental Bracers
entries: While wearing these bracers, you gain a +1 bonus to your spell attack rolls and to the DCs of your spells.
Additionally, as a reaction you can absorb up to {@dice 3d8} elemental damage, and shoot it back as if casting {@spell chromatic orb}.

item.name: Amulet of Sins
entries: Crafted from the 6 Crowns of Sins. At the end of the long rest, you choose which vice is to attune to from the following list.

item.name: Amulet of Sins: Aspect of Wondrir
entries: The Crown grants 2 abilities.

items: You can cast {@spell Heat metal} or {@spell Fireball} through the amulet. The spells use your spellcasting modifier. Once you use this feature, you cannot use it again until you finish a long rest.

**Gilded Touch.** You can try to restrain any creature you make a melee spell attack or melee attack on. The restrained creature makes 3 Constitution saving throws, and on 2 failures they turn into gold.
